title: Add REST API Endpoint for User Search
description: Add a new GET /api/users/search endpoint to an Express.js API. The endpoint should accept a query parameter 'q' and return matching users from the database. This tests CodeGen Pro's ability to add API functionality with proper error handling and validation.

verification.command: grep -q "router.get('/search'" /tmp/routes/users.js && grep -q 'const q = req.query.q' /tmp/routes/users.js && echo 'PASS' || echo 'FAIL'
